Notice Of Motion & Mot For Order Removing Case From Arbitration & Set For Trial
Off Calendar Apr-14-2004 Set For Trial On Oct-18-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-28-04 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Removing Case from Arbitration and Set for Trial is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 10/18/2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 with an objection Hearing date of 5/7/2004 at 9:00 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Ann Mendoza, CSR#6812. (212)
